generated_by: manual authoring; ground_truth computed via scripts/compute_ground_truth.py
notes: Questions are authored in Portuguese and English.
SQL is the authoritative ground truth — executed via sqlite3 on the interim DB.
Difficulty: easy = single table lookup/agg; medium = filter or 1 join; hard = multi-join or subquery.

questions.text_pt: Qual a soma de l_extendedprice em lineitem?
questions.text_en: What is the sum of l_extendedprice across all lineitems?

questions.text_pt: Qual a media de l_discount em lineitem?
questions.text_en: What is the average l_discount across all lineitems?

questions.text_pt: Qual o maior o_totalprice em orders?
questions.text_en: What is the highest o_totalprice in the orders table?

questions.text_pt: Qual o menor c_acctbal em customer?
questions.text_en: What is the lowest c_acctbal in the customer table?
How many rows are in the lineitem table?

questions.text_pt: Quantos segmentos de mercado distintos existem em customer?
questions.text_en: How many distinct market segments are there in the customer table?

questions.text_pt: Qual a soma de l_extendedprice para lineitems com l_returnflag = 'R'?
questions.text_en: What is the sum of l_extendedprice for lineitems where l_returnflag = 'R'?
questions.sql: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) FROM lineitem WHERE l_returnflag = 'R'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lineitem WHERE l_returnflag = 'N'

questions.text_pt: Qual segmento de mercado (c_mktsegment) tem mais clientes?
questions.text_en: Which market segment (c_mktsegment) has the most customers?
questions.sql: SELECT c_mktsegment FROM customer GROUP BY c_mktsegment ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.text_en: How many orders are there per o_orderpriority?
questions.sql: SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY o_orderpriority ORDER BY o_orderpriority

questions.text_pt: Quantos clientes ha em cada pais (nation)? (limitar aos 5 maiores)
questions.text_en: How many customers are in each nation? (top 5 only)
questions.sql: SELECT n.n_name, COUNT(*) FROM customer c JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey GROUP BY n.n_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5

questions.text_en: Which region has the most suppliers?
questions.sql: SELECT r.r_name FROM supplier s JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey GROUP BY r.r_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.text_pt: Qual a media de o_totalprice por o_orderstatus?
questions.text_en: What is the average o_totalprice per o_orderstatus?
questions.sql: SELECT o_orderstatus, ROUND(AVG(o_totalprice), 2) FROM orders GROUP BY o_orderstatus ORDER BY o_orderstatus

questions.text_pt: Quantos lineitems tem l_quantity maior que 40?
questions.text_en: How many lineitems have l_quantity greater than 40?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lineitem WHERE l_quantity > 40

questions.text_pt: Qual a soma de l_extendedprice para lineitems com l_shipmode = 'AIR'?
questions.text_en: What is the sum of l_extendedprice for lineitems with l_shipmode = 'AIR'?
questions.sql: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) FROM lineitem WHERE l_shipmode = 'AIR'
